source.section: Part 15 - Navigation & Case III Recovery > 5 - Waypoints > 5.5 - How to Edit Waypoints

steps.action: In the HSI page, press the OSB next to DATA.
steps.voiced: On the HSI page, press the OSB next to DATA.

steps.action: You will see the waypoint sequence. We want to edit the coordinates of Waypoint 7 (which we created in the previous tutorial).
steps.voiced: Confirm waypoint sequence is visible — select the waypoint to edit.

steps.action: Press the Waypoint Increment/Decrement OSBs to select WYPT 7
steps.voiced: Press the Waypoint Increment or Decrement OSBs to select the target waypoint.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to UFC (Up-Front Controller)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to UFC.

steps.action: On the UFC, press the OSB next to POSN (Position). « : » will appear once selected.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to POSN on the UFC — confirm colon appears.

steps.action: We will add the coordinates of the Senaki-Kolkhi Airdrome, which are in (deg, minutes, sec): 42°14.31' North 42°03.64' East
steps.voiced: Confirm the latitude/longitude coordinates for the target waypoint.

steps.action: On the UFC, press « 2 » (N) to select North coordinates, type « 421431 », then « ENT » to enter them.
steps.voiced: On the UFC, press 2 for North, enter the latitude digits, then press ENT.

steps.action: On the UFC, press « 6 » (E) to select East coordinates, type « 420364 », then « ENT » to enter them.
steps.voiced: Press 6 for East, enter the longitude digits, then press ENT.

steps.action: And that's it! You have edited Waypoint 7's coordinates. If you click on the OSB next to HSI, you can see that Waypoint 7 is now visible in the sequence lines. 5 - WAYPOINTS
steps.voiced: Confirm waypoint coordinates are updated — verify on the HSI sequence lines.
